import type { Theme } from "@/components/ui/theme-provider";

export const flexokiTheme: Theme = {
  border: {
    color: "#6f6e69",
    focusColor: "#879a39",
    style: "round",
  },
  colors: {
    accent: "#8b7ec8",
    accentForeground: "#100f0f",
    background: "#100f0f",
    border: "#6f6e69",
    error: "#d14d41",
    errorForeground: "#100f0f",
    focusRing: "#879a39",
    foreground: "#cecdc3",
    info: "#3aa99f",
    infoForeground: "#100f0f",
    muted: "#0a0a0a",
    mutedForeground: "#6f6e69",
    primary: "#da702c",
    primaryForeground: "#100f0f",
    secondary: "#1a1916",
    secondaryForeground: "#cecdc3",
    selection: "#da702c",
    selectionForeground: "#100f0f",
    success: "#879a39",
    successForeground: "#100f0f",
    warning: "#da702c",
    warningForeground: "#100f0f",
  },
  name: "flexoki",
  spacing: {
    0: 0,
    1: 1,
    2: 2,
    3: 3,
    4: 4,
    6: 6,
    8: 8,
  },
  typography: {
    base: "",
    bold: true,
    lg: "bold",
    sm: "dim",
    xl: "bold",
  },
};
